introSection: Raptor is a steel winged roller coaster located at Gardaland in Castelnuovo del Garda, Veneto, Italy. Opened in 2011, it is the first Bolliger & Mabillard Wing Coaster installation.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride has an underground station and a watersplash.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 2 trains with 7 cars per train. Riders are arranged 4 across in a single row for a total of 28 riders per train.

fullText:
Raptor is a steel winged roller coaster located at Gardaland in Castelnuovo del Garda, Veneto, Italy. Opened in 2011, it is the first Bolliger & Mabillard Wing Coaster installation.

Raptor opened on 1 April 2011.

The ride has an underground station and a watersplash.

2 trains with 7 cars per train. Riders are arranged 4 across in a single row for a total of 28 riders per train.
